zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期横盘震荡，潜在反弹机会
zh.content:
目前ETH/USD价格徘徊于2132.93附近，日内波动幅度有限，整体呈现横盘整理态势。短期均线SMA(20)位于2131.28，价格略高于均线，表明短期支撑尚可，但上涨动能有限。MACD正值1.30145，提示市场多头仍有一定力量，但缺乏明显信号确认趋势方向。

从支撑与阻力位来看，日内关键支撑位在2131附近，若跌破则可能加速下行压力；阻力位在2136-2140区间，多次测试未能有效突破，短线仍存在承压风险。价格震荡区间较窄，投资者需关注突破点的确认信号。

技术指标方面，RSI暂不可用，但结合MACD与均线观察，短期上涨动力不足，可能形成小幅反弹或横盘整理。若MACD继续上行并与信号线形成金叉，则有望带来短线反弹机会；反之则需防止回调风险加大。

交易策略上，可采取低吸高抛方式，关注支撑附近买入机会，同时在阻力区间适度减仓。风险控制上，建议设置止损于2128以下，以防快速下跌。整体来看，以太坊短期仍偏震荡，需谨慎跟随趋势操作，耐心等待明确突破信号。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading at 2132.93, hovering just above its 20-period simple moving average at 2131.28, which suggests a neutral-to-slightly bullish short-term bias. The narrow trading range between 2131.22 and 2136.86 over the last 24 hours indicates consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. With the daily change near flat at -0.10%, market participants appear cautious, awaiting a stronger catalyst before committing to larger positions.

Momentum signals provide a mildly constructive outlook. The MACD value of 1.301 suggests positive momentum remains present, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI data is unavailable, reducing visibility into overbought or oversold conditions. Nevertheless, price maintaining position above the SMA(20) supports the view that buyers continue to defend recent gains, even if upside momentum has moderated.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 2131.22, with stronger support around the SMA(20) zone at 2131.28. A sustained break below this area could expose downside risk toward the psychologically important 2125 level. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 2136.86, the recent session high. A successful breakout above this barrier could encourage further buying interest and open the path toward the 2145–2150 region.

For traders, the current environment favors patience and disciplined risk management. Aggressive bullish positions may be considered on a confirmed move above 2136.86 with rising volume, targeting higher resistance levels while placing protective stops below the support zone. More conservative participants may prefer to wait for either a clearer breakout or a pullback toward support before entering. Given the tight range and limited momentum confirmation, avoiding oversized positions remains prudent until stronger directional signals emerge.
